retry_reason: If task_work_cancel returns false, the work is already running or completed, and the callback will release the ref; retrying is useless.
contract_summary: This is a conditional-release wrapper: it cancels a previously scheduled task work callback that held a reference on the ctx object. If cancellation succeeds, it releases that reference (put) on the callback's behalf. If cancellation fails (because the callback is already running or has completed), the callback itself will handle releasing the reference. The caller should not reuse the ctx object after calling this function, regardless of the outcome, as ownership is transferred either to this function (on success) or remains with the running callback (on failure).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to conditionally release a reference on the bpf_task_work_ctx object (put) after attempting to cancel a scheduled task work. No other business logic.
